summary: Completed comprehensive testing of age-appropriate math curriculum. All 6 test scenarios passed. The curriculum correctly filters modules by age and generates appropriate questions for each age group.
passed_tests: Age 8 (Johnny) sees ONLY: Shapes, Add & Subtract, Multiply, Quiz - NO Counting, Numbers
Age 14 (namal) sees ONLY: Add & Subtract, Multiply, Divide, Fractions, Percentages, Algebra, Geometry, Exponents, Square Roots, Quiz - NO Counting, Numbers, Shapes
Age 5-6 (TestChild6) sees ONLY: Counting, Numbers, Shapes, Add & Subtract, Quiz - NO advanced modules
Age 14 Algebra questions are REAL algebra (e.g., '5x + 1 = 4x + 14. Find x') NOT simple counting
Age 5-6 Addition questions are within 10 (e.g., '4 + 5 = ?') with visual emojis
Quiz mode gives age-appropriate questions only (verified for ages 5-6, 8, and 14)
Visual emojis display correctly for young children (butterflies, cookies, etc.)
Module filtering based on minAge/maxAge in BASE_MODULES works correctly
Question generation API returns correct difficulty for each age_category
Frontend LearnPage.jsx correctly filters modules using getModulesForAge()
seed_data_creation: Created TestChild6 (age 6) with subscription for testing age 5-6 curriculum
context_for_next_testing_agent: Age-appropriate curriculum is fully working. Tested ages 5-6, 8, and 14. All module filtering and question generation is correct. Test accounts: testparent@test.com/test123 with children Johnny (age 8), namal (age 14), TestChild6 (age 6).
